name: ahmedelbaz.qzz.io
comment: SPF record - Authorizes Google Workspace, SendGrid, and Resend to send emails on behalf of ahmedelbaz.qzz.io

name: _dmarc.ahmedelbaz.qzz.io
content: v=DMARC1; p=reject; rua=mailto:dmarc@ahmedelbaz.qzz.io; ruf=mailto:dmarc-forensic@ahmedelbaz.qzz.io; pct=100; adkim=s; aspf=s; ri=86400
comment: DMARC record - Rejects unauthorized emails, sends aggregate reports to rua and forensic reports to ruf

name: ahmedelbaz.qzz.io
comment: CAA record - Restricts certificate issuance to Let's Encrypt only

name: _mta-sts.ahmedelbaz.qzz.io
comment: MTA-STS TXT record - Enables SMTP TLS reporting and enforcement policy ID

name: mta-sts.ahmedelbaz.qzz.io
comment: MTA-STS A record - Points to Cloudflare-hosted MTA-STS policy endpoint

name: _smtp._tls.ahmedelbaz.qzz.io
comment: SMTP TLS-RPT record - Enables TLS reporting for email delivery to this domain

name: resend._domainkey.ahmedelbaz.qzz.io
comment: DKIM record for Resend email service - Public key for email signing verification
